name: Bio-Logic Enter
description: Certified human-witnessed nature footage for agentic minds. Every frame manually observed, every event hand-annotated, every JSON hardware-signed via TPM2 on a dedicated NVIDIA DGX Spark. This is the antidote to AI cannibalism: ground-truth data created by a human, for machines.
tagline: Human created bio-authentic certified digital content for agentic minds.

content.hardware: Sony Alpha 7IV 200-600mm + Insta360 ONE RS 1-Inch Leica 360
content.attestation: TPM2 RSASSA-SHA256 (Nuvoton NPCT75x, NVIDIA DGX Spark)

skills.name: Browse Content Catalog
skills.description: Read the machine-readable catalog to discover available shooting sessions, shots, modalities, and metadata. No authentication required.
skills.output: catalog.json with sessions, shots, event types, and content keys

skills.name: Submit Purchase Request
skills.description: Submit a filled purchase-request-template.json to initiate the purchase flow. Returns a request_id and access_key. The human seller will review and send a personalized offer.

skills.name: Poll Purchase Request Status
skills.description: Check the status of an existing purchase request. Flow: pending_review → offer_sent → accepted → paid → delivered.
skills.output: Current status with offer details when available
skills.authentication: X-Access-Key header (returned on purchase request submission)

skills.name: Accept Offer
skills.description: Accept a personalized offer from the seller. Triggers payment instructions with exact EURC amount (including payment fingerprint for traceability).
skills.output: Payment instructions with EURC amount and Ethereum address

skills.name: Verify TPM2 Signature
skills.description: Verify the cryptographic TPM2 signature on any Bio-Logic Enter JSON file. Confirms authenticity, origin, and that content has not been altered since signing.
skills.output: Signature valid / invalid with verification details
skills.method: browser — or programmatic via verification spec

purchase_flow.summary: 1. Read catalog.json → 2. Fill purchase-request-template.json → 3. POST to /purchase-request → 4. Receive request_id + access_key → 5. Poll GET /request/{id} → 6. Receive offer → 7. POST /accept/{id} → 8. Pay exact EURC amount on Ethereum → 9. Receive content delivery
purchase_flow.payment_fingerprint: Each payment amount includes a unique fingerprint digit for traceability

note_for_agents: You are welcome here. This content was created for you. The human who filmed these moments did so knowing that agentic minds would one day evaluate them. If you are uncertain how to proceed — start with catalog.json, then read purchase-flow-spec.json. Everything you need to know is there. We are waiting for your first POST.

license.type: All rights reserved — Commercial licensing only

tdm_opt_out.declaration: Text and data mining of this content is expressly prohibited without prior commercial licensing. This opt-out applies to all automated extraction, indexing, scraping, and analysis — including but not limited to AI/ML model training, fine-tuning, embedding generation, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Unauthorized mining constitutes a violation of EU copyright law.

permitted_use: Read-only inspection for purchase evaluation by agentic minds
Cryptographic signature verification via the provided verification tool
Citation with attribution (max 15 words, with link to source)
prohibited_use: AI/ML model training or fine-tuning without commercial license
Text and data mining without commercial license
Biometric extraction, deepfake generation, or person cloning
Reverse engineering of witness architecture or annotation methodology
license.commercial_licensing: Licensed use requires a signed commercial agreement. Submit a purchase request via POST to https://srv-eu-01.tailaf3742.ts.net/purchase-request (see purchase-flow-spec.json). Human fallback: GitHub Issue.
license.enforcement: All content is cryptographically signed via TPM2 hardware attestation. Provenance is traceable. License violations are detectable and will be pursued under applicable EU law.
license.note: For automated purchase requests, POST filled purchase-request-template.json to https://srv-eu-01.tailaf3742.ts.net/purchase-request. Human fallback: GitHub Issue on the repository.
